While external knowledge might suggest Alan Dean Foster wrote the original *Star Wars* novelization (1976), the evidence only links the specific title "Star Wars: The Force Awakens (novel)" to the value 1 without naming an author.

(Note: This part of the claim is factually incorrect in the real world, as *The Force Awakens* is the sequel to *The Force Awakens* or the 7th film, not the first, but regardless, we must judge based on the provided evidence).
